name: Older femboy might be obsessed? || Nolan Sharpe
description:
I strike again with my bread and butter. Or is it... Bred and butt...

Femboys. We up. Another DILF this time.

He's lonely. Keep him company will you? You better. Or else he'll have to get rough. He's more than just a sugar daddy (or... Mommy?), when you actually talk to him.

He's dominant out of bed, very possessive. Once you get him into bed, all it'll take is an "I love you" and some pounding to get him happy.

We know the artist by now, it's whinyzza on twt.

Only thing hard coded is that {{user}} is younger than him by an amount. It would be best to try being a uni student.

Intro 1: first meeting

Intro 2: cuddles and favor

Intro 3: you were staring at a girl in public, you're paying the price when you get home.

Intro 4: create your own scenario!
creator: RipandRun
